en.about.title: ABOUT ME
en.about.interests: Game Dev, Scripting, 3D Modelling, Discord Bots
en.about.heading: Who is FayID?
en.about.desc: A passionate developer and Roblox creator who loves building things at the intersection of gaming and code. From scripting Discord bots to crafting immersive 3D models, I bring ideas to life with precision and creativity.
en.skills.title: EXPERIENCE
en.skills.lua.desc: Roblox scripting, game mechanics, NPC behavior systems and advanced Lua modules.
en.skills.djs.desc: Building feature-rich Discord bots with slash commands, databases, moderation, music and custom systems.
en.skills.roblox.desc: Creating detailed 3D environments, props, characters and game assets in Roblox Studio.
en.skills.html.desc: Building structured web pages with modern CSS animations, layouts and responsive design.
en.rating.title: RATE ME
en.rating.lockedDesc: Connect with Discord to leave your rating and review.
en.rating.formSub: How would you rate FayID's work?
en.rating.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first!

id.about.title: TENTANG SAYA
id.about.interests: Dev Game, Scripting, Modelling 3D, Bot Discord
id.about.heading: Siapa FayID?
id.about.desc: Developer dan kreator Roblox yang bersemangat membangun hal-hal di persimpangan gaming dan kode. Dari scripting bot Discord hingga membuat model 3D, saya mewujudkan ide dengan presisi dan kreativitas.
id.skills.title: PENGALAMAN
id.skills.lua.desc: Scripting Roblox, mekanik game, sistem perilaku NPC dan modul Lua tingkat lanjut.
id.skills.djs.desc: Membangun bot Discord dengan slash commands, database, moderasi, musik dan sistem kustom.
id.skills.roblox.desc: Membuat lingkungan 3D detail, prop, karakter dan aset game di Roblox Studio.
id.skills.html.desc: Membangun halaman web dengan animasi CSS modern, tata letak dan desain responsif.
id.rating.title: NILAI AKU
id.rating.lockedDesc: Hubungkan dengan Discord untuk memberikan penilaian dan ulasanmu.
id.rating.noReviews: Belum ada ulasan. Jadilah yang pertama!

hi.about.title: MERE BAARE MEIN
hi.about.interests: Game Dev, Scripting, 3D Modelling, Discord Bots
hi.about.heading: FayID kaun hai?
hi.about.desc: Ek passionate developer aur Roblox creator jo gaming aur coding ki duniya mein cheezein banata hai. Discord bots se lekar 3D models tak, main apne ideas ko creative tarike se sach karta hoon.
hi.skills.title: ANUBHAV
hi.skills.lua.desc: Roblox scripting, game mechanics, NPC behavior systems aur advanced Lua modules.
hi.skills.djs.desc: Feature-rich Discord bots banana slash commands, databases, moderation aur custom systems ke saath.
hi.skills.roblox.desc: Detailed 3D environments, props, characters aur game assets Roblox Studio mein banana.
hi.skills.html.desc: Structured web pages banana modern CSS animations, layouts aur responsive design ke saath.
hi.rating.title: RATE KARO
hi.rating.lockedDesc: Rating dene ke liye Discord se login karo.
hi.rating.formSub: FayID ke kaam ko kitna rate karoge?
hi.rating.noReviews: Abhi tak koi review nahi. Pehle bano!
